positive: A whimsical, stylized portrait of a floating crescent moon nestled amongst bioluminescent cosmic flora, featuring deep indigo blues, ethereal teals, and pops of glowing magenta and gold. The composition is centered, with the moon serving as the focal point, surrounded by intricate, hand-drawn stardust patterns and delicate, glowing vines. Style is elegant celestial art combined with simplified mid-century modern graphic design, utilizing clean silhouettes and high contrast. The overall feel is mystical and serene, perfect for a clean apparel print. Cinematic lighting, highly detailed vector quality, flat graphic illustration, minimal depth of field.
negative: blurry, messy, text, watermark, signature, logo, noise, artifact, bad anatomy, extra limbs, ugly, low resolution, grainy
